label: Subagent • residency handoff composes with the recursion guard
query: A scripted model-swapping subagent that also tries to nest another subagent.
notes: Model-free. The scripted kind sets needsHandoff=true (so the run must wrap through the residency handoff middleware) AND attempts a nested subagent mid-run (so the unified recursion guard must refuse it). Pins that the two middlewares COMPOSE: the outer run still succeeds, the handoff wrapped it, and the nested attempt was refused — the combination scripted-handoff-wraps and scripted-recursion-guard each prove in isolation.
